design_philosophy.core_loop: Drive Clarice's Honda City over elevated highways to paint them green while evading pursuing police cars and obstacles; collect oil cans to stun enemies; progress through 12 world-famous locations
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource scarcity (limited oil cans) versus constant pursuit pressure; time pressure through spike hazards if player lingers too long on a stage
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Global road trip adventure in a personal vehicle while outwitting law enforcement; exploration of world landmarks while maintaining agency through evasion and tactical item use
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Maze-chase hybrid that prioritizes spatial navigation and enemy manipulation over combat; features one of the first female protagonists in console gaming (Clarice); unique combination of painting/completion mechanic with pursuit gameplay; stage-specific music composition rather than looped soundtrack

difficulty.lives_system: Standard lives system with continues available
difficulty.continues_system: Continues system present, allowing progression after losing all lives
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based checkpointing; players restart from beginning of current stage upon loss
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Oil can collection and enemy-stunning mechanics provide tactical decision-making; cat obstacles are invulnerable and force route adaptation; spike hazard timer creates urgency without difficulty settings

progression.upgrade_system: Oil cans function as consumable resources that refresh throughout stages; red balloons (collect 3 for bonus and stage warp) provide optional progression acceleration
progression.unlock_mechanism: Completing stages sequentially unlocks next stage; balloon collection warps to new areas within game world
replayability_hooks: Multiple routes available on each stage to optimize painting coverage
Oil can and balloon collection encourages replays for high scores
Distinct world landmarks and stage-specific music provide fresh aesthetic per level
Challenge of evading increasingly aggressive police pursuit patterns

world_building_techniques: Landmark-based stage design (New York, London, Paris, Egypt, Japan, etc.) establishes global setting
Character motivation: Clarice searches for 'the perfect man' while traveling worldwide
Contextual obstacles reflect location themes (flag-waving cats as cultural/environmental barriers)
Stage-specific musical arrangements using classical pieces and location-appropriate themes

faction_indicators: Player-controlled protagonist (Clarice) versus police force pursuers
Flag-waving cats as environmental/cultural obstacles representing local resistance
danger_signals: Police cars with pursuit AI that actively chase player
Spike hazards triggered by time pressure on single stage
Invulnerable cat obstacles that force route recalculation
environmental_storytelling: World landmarks establish geographic setting and progression through global journey
Highway painting mechanic suggests infrastructure/territory control theme
Multi-stage world tour narrative expressed through stage selection and visual theming
